title: 'AAP no longer honest': Raghav Chadha, 6 other MPs in Rajya Sabha quit party, join BJP
content: Rajya Sabha MP Raghav Chadha has resigned from the Aam Aadmi Party, citing a deviation from its core principles and a focus on personal gain. He announced his departure alongside two other Rajya Sabha MPs, Sandeep Pathak and Ashok Mittal, who are joining the Bharatiya Janata Party. Chadha stated he felt like the 'right man in the wrong party'.

title: Raghav Chadha leads exodus to BJP as 7 MPs quit AAP - Who are these leaders
content: A significant political upheaval has occurred as prominent AAP Rajya Sabha member Raghav Chadha, along with six other MPs including Sandeep Pathak and Ashok Mittal, have defected to the Bharatiya Janata Party. Chadha cited disillusionment with party leadership and alleged involvement in 'crimes' as reasons for his departure, significantly weakening AAP's Rajya Sabha presence.

title: 'You can bowl this too, right?': Ashwin questions Pandya's death-over call
content: Ravichandran Ashwin criticised Hardik Pandya for giving rookie Krish Bhagat the death overs in Indian Premier League 2026 against Chennai Super Kings, where he conceded 31 runs. Ashwin felt Pandya should have taken responsibility, citing his experience. He also highlighted the pressure of replacing Rohit Sharma. Despite Pandya’s poor form, coach Mahela Jayawardene backed him ahead of the next game against Sunrisers Hyderabad.

title: KPMG to lay off 10% of US audit team after failed retirement efforts
content: KPMG is set to cut approximately 10% of its US audit partners after voluntary retirement schemes failed to yield desired results. The accounting giant, one of the Big Four, cited a need to align its partnership size with current business demands.

title: 'There's nothing left in Bengal': Amit Shah reacts to Mamata's 'conquer' BJP in Delhi threat
content: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee declared her intention to challenge the BJP nationally, aiming to unite opposition parties and dismantle the party at the Centre.  She vowed to win Bengal first, then take the fight to Delhi. Union Home Minister Amit Shah responded with a jibe, questioning her need to come to Delhi.

title: Dalal Street outlook: JP Morgan downgrades ratings to neutral; shares worst case scenario
content: JPMorgan has shifted its stance on Indian equities to neutral, citing high valuations and geopolitical uncertainties. The brokerage warns of a potential 15% Nifty 50 decline in a worst-case scenario, impacting earnings due to energy supply risks. While the long-term outlook remains robust, near-term caution is advised, with other emerging markets potentially offering better opportunities.

title: After $6.25bn 'gift' to 'Trump Accounts', Michael & Susan Dell donate $750m
content: Michael and Susan Dell have pledged $750 million to the University of Texas at Austin for a new medical center and research campus. This significant donation will focus on integrating AI and advanced computing to improve patient care, research, and education. The project, expected to open by 2030, aims to enhance Austin's healthcare capabilities and advance medical innovation.

title: 'He had no bad habits': Family of accused speaks out after killing of IRS officer's daughter
content: A 23-year-old man, Rahul, faces grave accusations of rape and murder in Delhi and sexual assault in Rajasthan within 24 hours. His family denies the allegations, citing his good behavior and academic record, suggesting online gaming debts may be a motive. Police are investigating both incidents, with Rahul in custody.

title: Bengal polls: PM Modi’s 'jhalmuri' stop draws Mamata’s 'bhelpuri' counter offer
content: West Bengal chief minister Mamata Banerjee accused Prime Minister Narendra Modi of staging his recent "jhalmuri" break during a campaign stop, alleging pre-planned arrangements and camera installations. She countered PM Modi's jhalmuri reference by listing diverse foods she consumes, questioning the BJP's confidence and suggesting EVM tampering. PM Modi had previously used the jhalmuri anecdote to target the TMC.

title: Dhurandhar 2 day 37: Ranveer Singh film eyes Pushpa 2 record on Friday
content: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge', directed by Aditya Dhar and starring Ranveer Singh, Sanjay Dutt, and R. Madhavan, has emerged as a global powerhouse, securing its spot as the third highest-grossing Indian film of all time with a worldwide gross of Rs. 1,766.12 crore. As of Day 37, the espionage epic is just a little over Rs. 111 crore away from shattering Allu Arjun’s 'Pushpa 2: The Rule' domestic net record and only Rs. 22 crore away from surpassing 'Baahubali 2: The Conclusion' globally. Despite being banned in Gulf countries and facing competition from Akshay Kumar’s 'Bhooth Bangla' and the ongoing IPL 2026, this U/A certified blockbuster continues its historic theatrical run.

title: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei warns AI Industry: Stop lying about the disruption
content: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei is warning the AI industry to stop downplaying disruption—and start owning it. Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei is warning the AI industry to stop downplaying disruption—and start owning it. Speaking to the Financial Times, he predicted AI could wipe out 50% of entry-level white-collar jobs within five years. With trust in short supply and early-career workers already feeling the squeeze, Amodei argues the industry's credibility depends on delivering real benefits, not just promising them.

title: India-US trade deal: Govt shares update on agreement; here's what both sides agreed to
content: India and the US concluded three days of trade talks in Washington, aiming to finalize an interim trade pact and advance negotiations for a broader bilateral agreement. Discussions covered market access, digital commerce, and economic security.

title: Fresh bid to impeach CEC Gyanesh Kumar, oppn notice in Rajya Sabha signed by 73 MPs
content: Opposition parties have submitted a fresh notice in Rajya Sabha seeking the removal of Chief Election Commissioner Gyanesh Kumar, backed by 73 MPs. This follows earlier rejected impeachment notices, with accusations of 'partial conduct' favoring the ruling BJP, particularly concerning electoral roll revisions. The move occurs amidst political tensions surrounding West Bengal's assembly elections.

title: Complaint filed against woman for protesting traffic jam during BJP rally in Mumbai
content: A complaint has been lodged with Mumbai Police against a woman who confronted Maharashtra minister Girish Mahajan during a BJP rally in Worli over traffic congestion caused by the event. The complaint, filed by Zen Sadavarte—daughter of lawyer Gunratna Sadavarte—alleges that the woman disrupted the rally, used abusive language, and created public disturbance.

title: '98 but still young’: How Prabhavati Nani turned her kitchen into business
content: Prabhavati Nani from Ahmedabad found a new purpose later in life. After her husband passed away, she started Nani's Nashta from her home kitchen. This venture now serves over 200 families. Anand Mahindra shared her inspiring story, highlighting that age is not a limit for starting something new. Her simple, home-cooked food connects with many.

title: IPL: Samson storms up the Orange Cap race; Kamboj reclaims Purple Cap top spot
content: Anshul Kamboj reclaims the Purple Cap with 14 wickets after CSK's dominant win over Mumbai Indians. Sanju Samson's second century propels him to third in the Orange Cap race, trailing Sunrisers Hyderabad's Abhishek Sharma and Heinrich Klaasen. Upcoming matches offer opportunities for other top performers to ascend the leaderboards.

title: Hair oil, ACs, soaps become costlier: How FMCG firms are dealing with Iran supply blow
content: Indian consumer goods firms are grappling with soaring input costs, driven by the Middle East conflict. Companies are now tracking expenses daily and frequently adjusting prices, impacting long-term strategies. Executives fear higher prices could dampen consumer spending, which had recently shown signs of recovery.  This volatility is forcing immediate, short-term decisions across various product categories.

title: FM Sitharaman flags AI cyber risks amid Anthropic ‘Mythos’ concerns
content: Finance minister Nirmala Sitharaman has directed banks to bolster cybersecurity against advanced AI threats, including those posed by Anthropic's 'Claude Mythos'. Emphasizing proactive measures and real-time threat sharing, she urged banks to collaborate, hire top professionals, and leverage AI for defense, ensuring robust protection of customer data and financial assets.

title: 'Happy Birthday but ... ': Arjun Tendulkar wishes father Sachin - Watch
content: Arjun Tendulkar shared a funny birthday wish for Sachin Tendulkar, saying, "Happy Birthday, I am not going to eat this because I don't eat sugar very often. I will see you soon." As Sachin turned 53, fans celebrated his legendary career, highlighted by 34,357 international runs, most centuries, and a lasting legacy as one of cricket’s greatest icons.

title: Kohli to Gill: 5 players battle to watch in today's IPL match between RCB and GT
content: Both Royal Challengers Bengaluru and Gujarat Titans seek a rebound after recent defeats in IPL 2026. RCB, third in the standings, hosts GT, who are seventh, in a crucial encounter. Key player battles, including Bhuvneshwar Kumar vs. Shubman Gill and Virat Kohli vs. Kagiso Rabada, are set to influence the outcome.

title: 'What mistake did I commit?' Pappu Yadav refuses to apologise for remarks on women
content: Independent MP Pappu Yadav defends his statements on the Women's Reservation Bill. He asserts his commitment to protecting women entering politics. Yadav alleges exploitation of young girls by leaders and capitalists. He claims his remarks highlight the struggles women face in the political arena. The Bihar State Women's Commission has sought an explanation for his offensive statements.

title: PSL toss turns WWE! Mascots ‘fight’, Ramiz Raja’s commentary steals show – Watch
content: A pre-match mascot scuffle at the Pakistan Super League's Karachi Kings vs. Lahore Qalandars clash provided hilarious entertainment, with commentator Ramiz Raja's witty narration stealing the show. Later, Khushdil Shah's explosive 44 off 14 balls, including 37 in the last 10 deliveries, powered Karachi to a thrilling five-wicket victory chasing 200, keeping their tournament hopes alive.

title: Days before fiancée’s visit, govt executive found dead in Gurgaon flat
content: A 29-year-old executive was found dead in his Gurgaon flat, with police suspecting an overdose of sexual enhancement pills. Colleagues alerted authorities after he failed to respond. The man, originally from Nagpur and recently engaged, was found alone in his locked apartment. A postmortem is pending to confirm the cause of death.

title: ‘I’m not going to eat this…’ Arjun Tendulkar refuses cake on Sachin Tendulkar’s birthday
content: Sachin Tendulkar celebrated his 53rd birthday with warm wishes. A video showed his son Arjun Tendulkar declining to eat birthday cake, citing his low sugar intake. This simple act of honesty resonated with fans online. The focus remained on Sachin's legendary career and his numerous cricket records. His achievements continue to inspire.

title: CCTV captures chaos at Iran hospitals amid strikes; patients and staff seen scrambling
content: Surveillance footage reveals chaotic scenes in Tehran hospitals during air strikes, with medical staff urgently evacuating patients, including newborns carried in fruit baskets. The ongoing Iran conflict, sparked by Operation Epic Fury, has escalated tensions in the Persian Gulf, disrupting oil shipments and leading to naval confrontations.

title: Stock market crash: Why have Sensex, Nifty dropped over 1% in trade today? Top reasons
content: Technology stocks bore the brunt of the selling. Shares of Infosys, HCLTech, Tech Mahindra and Tata Consultancy Services fell between 2 per cent and 4 per cent after Infosys’ fourth-quarter results failed to meet market expectations.

title: Gambler, psychopath, Rs 7 lakh debt: What we know about Delhi IRS officer’s daughter's killer
content: A former domestic help, Rahul, allegedly raped and murdered a civil services aspirant in South Delhi. Driven by debt from gambling, addiction, and resentment after losing his job, Meena used his knowledge of the victim's home to gain entry.

title: With Polgar, Gukesh's coach as followers, 12-yo Sarbalia reshapes chess as content
content: 12-year-old Aarav Sarbalia is gaining recognition as a rising chess talent. Alongside his on-board progress, his structured social media content has attracted prominent followers, including Judit Polgar and D Gukesh's coach, Vishnu Prasanna. Supported by his family and guided by top coaching, Aarav is building momentum toward his long-term goal of achieving the Grandmaster (GM) title.

title: 'Will win 110 seats in phase-1': Amit Shah predicts BJP sweep after record turnout in Bengal polls
content: Union Home Minister Amit Shah stated that the high voter turnout in the first phase of the West Bengal assembly elections signals a desire for change. He asserted that the Bharatiya Janata Party is poised for victory and will form the next government with an absolute majority.

title: Gold price prediction: Will prices recover today & what should investors do?
content: Gold price prediction today: Gold prices continue to be volatile and a buy on dips strategy is recommended for today, says Jateen Trivedi, VP Research Analyst - Commodity and Currency, LKP Securities recommends a buy on dip strategy.

title: Iran admits 'strategic mistake' over nuclear issue at negotiation table in Pak
content: In a bold declaration, an MP from Iran has criticized the recent diplomatic discussions held in Pakistan, deeming them a 'tactical blunder.' He contended that engaging in dialogue about Iran's nuclear ambitions has undermined Tehran's negotiating position. The MP disclosed that the US had imposed a demand for a two-decade suspension on enriched uranium activities, which Iran firmly turned down.

title: No PSL for Mustafizur Rahman as Bangladesh board withdraws NOC
content: Bangladesh have prioritised player fitness after the ODI series against New Zealand, ruling Mustafizur Rahman out of PSL 2026 due to injury and sending him for scans and rehab. Nahid Rana has also been held back to prepare for the Pakistan Tests. With key pacers rested, Bangladesh named a fresh T20I squad for the New Zealand series, handing debut call-ups to Abdul Gaffar Saqlain and including Ripon Mondal to test new talent.

title: Infosys share price today: Stock falls around 4% after Q4 numbers; what’s the outlook?
content: Brokerage views on Infosys remain mixed, with analysts balancing near-term challenges against the company’s long-term positioning. They have expressed a measured outlook on Infosys.

title: ‘He knew we needed him’: Gaikwad dedicates CSK win to Mukesh after mother’s passing
content: Chennai Super Kings captain Ruturaj Gaikwad dedicated their 103-run victory over Mumbai Indians to teammate Mukesh Choudhary, who played despite his mother's recent passing. Gaikwad praised Choudhary's courage, while Sanju Samson's unbeaten 101 powered CSK to 207/6. Spinners Akeal Hosein and Noor Ahmad then restricted MI to 104, securing a dominant win.

title: 22 militants killed in northwest Pak clashes after army firefight near Afghan border
content: Pakistani security forces killed 22 alleged militants in Khyber District during an operation that also resulted in the death of a 10-year-old child. This incident occurs amidst a rise in militant attacks, particularly in provinces bordering Afghanistan, and ongoing tensions between Pakistan and Kabul.

title: 'I left school at 11, washed utensils for Rs 60': Munawar Faruqui recalls his struggling days
content: Bigg Boss 17 winner Munawar Faruqui revealed his challenging childhood, starting work at nine and leaving school at eleven to wash utensils for a meager wage. He shared his father's fear of him becoming a driver, stemming from his own 30-year career.

title: Boat ride, camera in hand: PM Modi shares Hooghly moments; 'Maa Ganga' message from Bengal — watch
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi shared moments from his visit to the Hooghly river banks in Kolkata, including a boat ride. He expressed gratitude to Maa Ganga and met with local boatmen and morning walkers. The visit occurred amidst ongoing political campaigning for the West Bengal assembly elections, with the BJP aiming to unseat the ruling Trinamool Congress.

title: Instagram user's 'jaldi aa jaiye' message gets a prompt reply from Amit Shah in Bengal
content: Union Home Minister Amit Shah's social media interaction with a supporter waiting for his roadshow in West Bengal went viral. Shah, who had posted a sunset video with a swipe at the ruling TMC, apologized for the delay to a user waiting in the heat. He later held the roadshow, highlighting public sentiment against TMC's alleged atrocities.

title: Before South Delhi IRS officer’s daughter’s murder, accused raped his friend’s wife
content: A 22-year-old IRS officer's daughter was found dead in Delhi, allegedly by a former domestic helper. Hours before this crime, the accused reportedly committed a sexual assault in his native Alwar village. Investigators are piecing together a rapid sequence of events across two states, fueled by alleged gambling debts.

title: Barrier-free tolling on several NHs across country from December: Gadkari
content: This new system facilitates barrier-free tolling using integrated technologies, including Automatic Number Plate Recognition (ANPR) with AI analytics and RFID-based Electronic Toll Collection (FASTag).

title: Supreme Court refuses to entertain pleas of those on election duty in Bengal, asks them to move tribunal
content: The apex Court asked them to approach the appellate tribunals constituted to decide appeals against the deletion or exclusion of names from the voter list

title: Around 240 Indians claiming descent from biblical tribe arrive at Israel’s Tel Aviv
content: The newcomers passed under a balloon arch in blue and white, the colours of Israeli flag, as dozens of well-wishers welcomed them with a traditional Jewish song

title: Consumption sustaining growth; predictable support essential for GDP expansion: Finance Minister
content: The Committee of Bankers is looking into the issue of whether to allow exclusive distribution tie-ups for selling third-party products by banks or adopt an open architecture approach,” says Finance Minister

title: Raghav Chadha, six AAP MPs join BJP
content: Besides Raghav Chadha, Rajya Sabha MPs Sandeep Pathak, Ashok Mittal, Harbhajan Singh, Rajinder Gupta, Vikram Sahney and Swati Maliwal also quit the party

title: 50 TMCft of water to be released for 4.47 lakh acres in combined Nellore district in rabi season
content: The IAC meeting was held on Thursday evening under chairmanship of Minister for Endowments Anam Ramanarayana Reddy

title: Rupee ends 22 paise weaker at 94.23 against U.S. dollar
content: “The rupee fell due to risk aversion in global markets as the US blockade of the Strait of Hormuz continued to keep the tensions high” says Anuj Choudhary, Research Analyst at Mirae Asset ShareKhan

title: West Bengal election: PM Modi says phase-1 polling signals 'wave of change'; claims TMC destroyed State’s identity
content: Referring to the mother of R.G. Kar rape-murder victim, who is the BJP’s candidate from Panihati, PM Modi said “her daughter was taken away by TMC”

title: Rahul Gandhi 'disagreed' on government CIC candidate: RTI response reveals
content: LoP Rahul Gandhi, instead, suggested the name of former Labour Ministry Secretary and 1991-batch IAS, Sumita Dawra (retd).

title: Kerala health alert: Public urged to stay vigilant against amoebic brain infections during summer
content: Health Minister advises people to avoid bathing or washing their faces with unclean water and stressed the need to maintain hygiene in water sources

title: West Bengal voter turnout makes me certain of BJP’s landslide victory: PM Modi
content: “I had 'jhalmuri' in Bengal, but it seems that the TMC leaders are feeling the heat of the chillies,” PM Modi said

title: How is ethanol used in Sustainable Aviation Fuel?
content: Since ATJ prevents raw ethanol from running through jet engines, it will not reduce thrust or clog fuel lines by absorbing moisture

title: What is 100% ethanol blending? | Explained
content: Increasing Sustainable Aviation Fuel production without further stressing sugarcane production will depend on how quickly second-generation ethanol can be produced in commercial volumes

title: FEFKA council rejects B. Unnikrishnan’s offer to step down from general secretary post
content: Unnikrishnan had expressed his desire to resign citing ‘personal reasons’. He had also suggested a new leadership for the federation after remaining at its helm for nearly 18 years

title: M. Swaraj says ‘IUML’s Jamaat faction’ spreading fake news against him, plans legal action
content: In a Facebook post, Swaraj denies meeting Pratheesh Viswanath, a right-wing activist, and describes the episode as part of long-running campaign to portray him as a ‘Hindu communalist’

title: Supreme Court directs Uttar Pradesh DGP to form SIT to probe minor's rape and murder in Ghaziabad
content: The SIT will look into all the grievances raised by the victim's parents and also probe the role of two private hospitals, which allegedly denied treatment to the victim, the Bench said.

title: NDA government wins Bihar trust vote in Assembly
content: BJP-led alliance secures confidence motion by voice vote; Opposition cites “fifth government in five years”

title: India’s butterfly boom: How Nature walks, parks, and trails are sparking a new conservation movement
content: From Bengaluru’s urban forests to the Northeast’s biodiversity hotspots, enthusiasts and experts are turning butterfly-watching into a powerful gateway to ecology, education, and sustainable travel

title: Electric carmaker Tesla to expand supercharging network in India
content: "We already have five super charging stations in India, which we have built around the lifestyle of our customers, where they go to work, shop, dine and travel," Tesla India General Manager

title: Centre’s move on women’s quota, delimitation aimed at political gains, says MP G. Kumar Naik
content: He said the Centre had moved ahead without adequate consultation or discussion with Opposition parties and attempted to bring in the legislation at the last minute through a sudden notification

title: Srikakulam reels under summer heat; Kotturu records 45.4°C
content: The district administration has asked people to stay indoors between 11 a.m. and 4 p.m.; the AP Physics Teachers’ Forum has linked the heat to climate change and urbanisation, calling for large-scale plantation drives in the coming monsoon

title: ‘Madhuvidhu’ movie review: A light-hearted film that squanders a promising conflict
content: Ably supported by reliable performers like Sharafudheen, Jagadish, Sai Kumar and Azees Nedumangad, this Vishnu Aravind directorial hurtles from one contrived situation to the next as the writing leaves much to be desired

title: Coast guard chopper on training sortie flies over Sabarimala; ICG says due to bad weather
content: Police register case after Sabarimala Special Commissioner orders inquiry due to ‘sensitive security’ of the hill temple

title: SSLC exam-1 results: Karnataka records ‘historic’ 94.1% pass percentage
content: The results have shown a marked improvement, with a 14.06 percentage point increase compared to the 80.04% recorded last year

title: Karnataka’s new excise regime calibrates taxes to social cost of alcohol
content: Social cost that has been calculated to be around ₹1,270 per litre of alcohol in beverage in 2024-2025 and is estimated to around ₹2,000 by 2028-2029

title: TCS Nashik case highlights gaps in PoSH reporting and implementation | Data
content: Beyond data gaps, fear for reputation, lack of trust in authorities and unclear procedures continue to prevent women from reporting sexual harassment

title: After SSLC results, Mangaluru MLA has a question for Karnataka Minister Priyank Kharge
content: Mangaluru City North MLA Y. Bharat Shetty suggests Mr. Kharge to improve education system in Kalaburgi instead of criticising Dakshina Kannada

title: DGP orders provision of essential facilities for traffic police amid rising summer heat and harsh working conditions in Karnataka
content: The order comes following a representation by Mohan Kumar Danappanavar, member of the Karnataka State Police Complaints Authority, who highlighted the health risks faced by traffic police personnel working under extreme weather conditions

title: ‘Anga, Banga, Kalinga’ will have BJP governments next month: Amit Shah
content: The Union Home Minister said a Bengal-born and Bengali-speaking person will be the Chief Minister of West Bengal when the BJP comes to power

title: Kerala Assembly polls: IUML legislator Abdul Hameed slams Congress over CM debate
content: IUML Malappuram district general secretary P. Abdul Hameed, MLA, warns such talks could ‘disappoint’ UDF supporters in Kerala

title: AP Ministers continue Singapore training on governance, development models
content: The six-Minister delegation, on a week-long official visit from April 20 to 27 under the Swarna Andhra Vision 2047, heard former Minister Lim Swee Say outline Singapore’s shift from a ‘nation-first’ to a ‘we-first’ governance model.

title: Reviving Panchayati Raj system more urgent than raising Lok Sabha strength to ensure personal political survival: Congress
content: On Panchayati Raj day, the Congress also said that it is fully committed to strengthening the spirit of Gram Swaraj and congratulated the village heads and members of the panchayats and local bodies across the country

title: How Folksoul brings marginalised women artistes together
content: Founded by rapper Krantinaari and musician Charu Hariharan, the collective channels stories of identity and resilience through its performances.

title: Pahalgam, a year on: Resilience falters, tourism struggles
content: After the initial shock and grief of the April 2025 terrorist attack that killed 26 unarmed men on south Kashmir’s Baisaran meadow, Peerzada Ashiq finds that locals grapple with an uncertain future. Tourism is low, livelihoods have been lost, and heightened security measures are in place

title: APPCB sets up help desk at Ongole for industrialists filing pollution permits
content: The desk will help industrial units in Prakasam and Bapatla districts file applications on the APOCMMS portal and reduce delays in obtaining ‘Consent for Establishment’ and ‘Consent for Operation’ approvals.

title: LDF sees Indira Canteen proposal as bid to undermine Samridhi@Kochi
content: LDF criticises Indira Canteen proposal, claiming it undermines Samridhi@Kochi’s efforts to provide affordable meals in Kochi

title: Samridhi vs Indira Canteen row erupts again in Kerala amid political slugfest over food sourcing
content: Budget initiative by Kochi Corporation and Kudumbashree faces controversy as LDF accuses UDF of misusing food from Samridhi to support Indira Canteen. Kochi Mayor claims the arrangement ‘benefits the women behind Samridhi’. The new dispute is sparked by LDF leader V.A. Sreejith’s social media claims

title: T.N. polls: Accessible elections remain out of reach for persons with disabilities
content: As most polling stations were situated in schools, the grounds were filled with sand or gravel, making it unsuitable for wheelchairs to navigate

title: Supreme Court refers AgustaWestland middleman James' bail plea to another Bench
content: The Delhi High Court had on April 8 dismissed the petition of the British national in the case, saying there was no merit in the plea of Mr. James who was extradited from Dubai in December 2018

title: Riots 2020: High Court dismisses Delhi Police appeal against bail to Ishrat Jahan
content: "Considerable period of more than four years has passed since the impugned order and there is no allegation that the respondent has in any manner violated the terms of the bail. We are not inclined to interfere with the impugned order. The appeal is accordingly dismissed," says the Bench

title: Army chief Upendra Dwivedi inducted into International Hall of Fame at U.S. Army War College
content: General Dwivedi, a distinguished fellow of the U.S. Army War College, is the third Indian Chief of Armed Forces to be inducted into the International Hall of Fame after General V.K. Singh and General Bikram Singh

title: BJP has sought to 'finish' off Nitish: Tejashwi in Bihar Assembly
content: We knew that the BJP would not let Nitish Kumar remain the CM. The BJP kept saying that Nitish would be the NDA's leader till 2030. But now they have finished him off, says RJD working president Tejashwi Yadav

title: Get out, you're causing traffic jam: Woman snaps at Minister during BJP's Mumbai rally
content: The incident occurred on April 21, when Mahajan was addressing reporters at the rally, organised to target Opposition parties over the defeat of the Constitution Amendment Bill, which aimed to fast-track the implementation of 33% reservation for women in legislative bodies, in the Lok Sabha

title: Tamil Nadu elections: Voters upset over SIR-related deletions across State
content: A resident says that her family filled out the forms and submitted all the required documents, but the names were removed from the list after SIR exercise. We did not get any response even after we reached out to several officials, she adds

title: Guntur Municipal Corporation wins UNIDO’s 4th Gender Equality Mobilisation Award in Vienna
content: The award, presented at the International Day of Women in Industry 2026 celebrations, recognises the civic body’s deployment of 200 women as electric auto drivers for door-to-door garbage collection; GMC has also earned State-level recognition for property tax collection.

title: Troubled waters: A.P., T.N. fishermen embroiled in a row
content: The seizure of four mechanised boats owned by Tamil Nadu fishermen at Juvvaladinne Fishing Harbour in Nellore district by local fisherfolk has prompted the Andhra Pradesh government to reinitiate boat patrolling across four coastal districts, bringing to the fore yet again a four-decade-old issue of illegal intrusion. The conflict takes a political turn and the repercussions are witnessed in 164 A.P. villages, narrates N. S. Chowdary

title: Raghav Chadha's BJP Shocker For Arvind Kejriwal. 6 Other MPs To Switch Too
content: Raghav Chadha to join BJP, says two-thirds of AAP members in Rajya Sabha are merging with the ruling party

title: Swati Maliwal, Harbhajan Singh: Raghav Chadha Names 7 AAP MPs Joining BJP
content: Raghav Chadha, a senior Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) Rajya Sabha MP, announced today that he is quitting the party and joining the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP), along with a significant number of other AAP members in the Upper House.

title: How The Raghav Chadha-AAP Break-Up Unfolded
content: The first sign of trouble was seen in 2024 in the absence of any reaction from Raghav Chadha when Arvind Kejriwal was arrested in the liquor policy case

title: Iran War Impacted Diesel Prices Much More Than Gasoline. Here's Why
content: The United States is the biggest exporter of petroleum products, including diesel. But with a fifth of the world's oil supply choked off at Hormuz, even the US could not make up for the shortfall.

title: Iran War Opens Investment Window? Property Prices Fall In Dubai, Check New Rates
content: Dubai Real Estate Prices: An analysis shows that sales in the secondary market -- older, ready homes -- have fallen nearly 30 per cent in one month.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Germany's First 'Military Strategy' In 77 Years Is A Wake-Up Call For India
content: On April 22, India and Germany signed a Defence Industrial Cooperation Roadmap in Berlin, alongside a P-75I submarine deal. On the same day, something far more consequential was released.

title: Delhi Murder Autopsy Reveals Ex-Help's Brutality, Woman's Fight To Save Life
content: The woman was raped and murdered on Wednesday morning in Delhi, allegedly by her family's former domestic help.

title: Peravoor Election 2026: KK Shailaja Takes On Congress Heavyweight Sunny Joseph
content: A litmus test for KK Shailaja as she faces three-time MLA and KPCC president Sunny Joseph from Peravoor in the 2026 Assembly elections in Kerala.

title: Armed With Gun, Knife, Spray, Lock, Woman Stabs Lover's Wife 10 Times
content: Neighbours witnessed the brutal crime as they stood outside the house, recording the incident through the door.

title: Madhya Pradesh Man Forced To Drink Urine, Beaten After Son Elopes With Lover
content: The sequence of violence that crossed all limits of brutality was captured on camera and circulated on social media.

title: Pentagon Email Floats Suspending Spain From NATO, Other Steps Over Iran Rift: Report
content: An internal Pentagon email outlines options for the United States to punish NATO allies it believes failed to support U.S. operations in the war with

title: "Feel Very Proud": Chief Justice On 92% Voter Turnout In Bengal
content: Chief Justice of India Surya Kant said that when people exercise their right to vote, the democratic set-up strengthens.

title: 162 Officials Shifted After Rekha Gupta's Surprise Visit To Delhi GST Office
content: During the inspection, the Chief Minister reviewed operations at the GST office and interacted with officials and taxpayers.

title: Mamata Banerjee's "I Will Take Over Delhi" Remark Amuses Amit Shah
content: Mamata Banerjee said she will "dismantle" the BJP in the Centre by bring together the Opposition parties.

title: Nagpur Man Collapses After Gym Session, Mother's Alertness Saves Him From Paralysis
content: Diagnostic tests found a blood clot in the 23-year-old's brain, which was removed using a mechanical thrombectomy procedure.
